Frequently asked

What counts as a connector?
Each integration point counts: one Stripe account, one AWS account, one Workspace domain, one Shopify store, one Salesforce org = 1 connector each.
Can I add more connectors later?
Yes — upgrade your plan or contact us for add-ons. You can also switch connectors without losing alert history.
Is the quarterly discount locked in?
Yes, the rate is locked for the 3-month billing period. You can cancel any time before renewal.
What happens when the trial ends?
You'll get an email 3 days before expiry. If you don't upgrade, alerts pause — your data is retained for 30 days.
Do you have a SOC 2 report?
Growth and Enterprise plans include our SOC 2 Type II report on request. We're currently completing our Type II audit.
